name: Zoodiac Drident
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>十</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>二</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>に</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ドランシア
name_jp_tl: Drancia of the Twelve Zodiac Beasts
desc:
4 Level 4 monsters
Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Zoodiac Drident" by using 1 "Zoodiac" monster you control with a different name as material. (Transfer its materials to this card.) Gains ATK/DEF equal to the ATK/DEF of all "Zoodiac" monsters attached to it as material. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 face-up card on the field; destroy it.

summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
